faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Glen Oaks homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Glen Oaks homes, they commonly appear in bathroom drains, kitchen sinks, basement floor drains, and rarely-used plumbing fixtures. The moist, nutrient-rich film that accumulates in pipes provides the perfect breeding ground for these pests.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Glen Oaks properties take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and growth regulators, and provide follow-up recommendations. You may see results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: What is included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and plumbing fixtures, identification of breeding sites, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic matter, use of growth regulators to prevent larvae development, and detailed prevention advice. The price varies based on property size, number of drains affected, and severity of infestation.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for Glen Oaks families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use eco-friendly, low-toxicity products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We primarily use bio-enzymatic cleaners and bacterial treatments that naturally break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. These methods are particularly suitable for Glen Oaks homes and apartment buildings where families live in close quarters.
